creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

There is a valid GnuPG signature for the revised tarball, and Franke's
announcement that the original tarball lacked a PKG_CONFIG related
expansion (see URL above in PR) seems plausible:

autoconf just warns about missing macros and leaves them unexpanded, not
necessarily leading to ./configure issues -- instead, syntax errors in
the shell script might only show for particular options.

It would seem in order to change distinfo to:

SHA256 (smartmontools-5.42.tar.gz) =
b664d11e814e114ce3a32a4fa918c9e649c684e2897c007b2a8b92574decc374
SIZE (smartmontools-5.42.tar.gz) = 742138

To fix the non-fetchability of the port.
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNATURE-----
Version: GnuPG v1.4.11 (GNU/Linux)
